name: ncbt
description: NCBT – National CBT: India's Trusted Platform for Nursing, Pharmacist & Paramedical Government Exam Preparation

scripts.build: vite build && tsx prerender.ts && cp dist/index.html dist/404.html && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --sourcemap --outfile=dist/server.cjs
